skill1.kitLine: Activates after landing 10 normal attack(s). Affects self.
skill1.note: Faithful trigger encoding; stack level derived natively by engine from cadence (no haircut knob — see ⚑2).

skill1.kitLine: ATK ▲ 23.15%, stacks up to 5 time(s) and lasts for 5 sec.

skill1.note: Engine has no HP-drain mechanic and it is not a heal/HP-buff hard-rule class. Documented as her design ENABLER: geometric self-drain (×0.9599/proc) justifies treating the HP-gated crit buffs as assumed-active (⚑3). Does no damage itself.

skill2.kitLine: There is a 30% chance of activating when attacked.
skill2.note: 'When this unit is hit' is the sanctioned skip class — v1 sim models no incoming boss attacks, so the trigger never fires in-sim. Note records that an older materialized file misparsed this as a passive flatDamage with an invented trigger; that was removed.

skill2.kitLine: Deals 138.24% of final ATK as additional damage.
skill2.note: Payload of the attacked-proc above; unmodeled for the same reason. Real-fight contribution ⚑4-flagged (~0-3% of real solo total).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when HP falls below 60%. Affects self.
skill2.where: skill2[0].trigger {kind:passive} (HP<60% gate folded into passive assumption)
skill2.note: Engine has no HP trigger; gate assumed permanently satisfied via S1 self-drain arithmetic (⚑3). Over-credits roughly the first ~28s before the drain crosses 60%.
Value matches L10; 'continuously' encoded as duration-less passive self buff.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Activates when HP falls below 50%.
burst.note: HP gate assumed satisfied at cast (⚑3). Her first burst (~15-25s) may really precede the threshold — flagged as a known over-credit on the first cast.
'All enemies' collapses to the single partless boss in scope.

burst.kitLine: Deals 849.15% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.
burst.note: Value matches L10. Burst-cast damage, auto FB-exempt; no noFb set. No element buff (clean ×1.10 default), no pierce, hitsPerShot 1.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑1 CADENCE TUPLE (escalated to likely-wrong): 20-ammo AR with normalMult 27.08 (~3× usual AR per-shot) + melee-slash flavor = non-class fire-mode tell; datamined pullsPerSec + reloadFrames 159 (~2.65s) unverified, rolling-reload unknown.
documentedConfounds.why: Fire-rate/reload is the dominant DPS driver for an AR; if the datamined cadence is wrong the whole damage estimate moves. Direction uncertain but highest-leverage input.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑2 S1 STACK STEADY-STATE: at datamined cadence ATK stacks sit near-permanent ~5/5 (5s dur spans the 2.65s reload); if real fire rate is slower the stack level drops. Entirely cadence-driven, moves with ⚑1.
documentedConfounds.why: S1 ATK% stack uptime directly scales all damage; a slower real cadence would lower uptime and thus sim-vs-real, but as modeled it assumes near-full uptime.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑3 HP-THRESHOLD GATES: S2b (HP<60% crit-dmg) and burst (HP<50% crit-rate) modeled assumed-active per S1 self-drain arithmetic; over-credits S2b for the first ~28s and the burst crit-rate may miss her first cast.
documentedConfounds.why: Assuming the gates always-satisfied over-credits crit stats during early ramp, biasing sim high vs a real fight where the thresholds are not yet crossed — a known, bounded over-estimate.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑4 S2a ATTACKED-PROC: 30%-when-attacked → 138.24% additional damage is unmodeled; est 0 in-sim / ~0-3% of real solo total.
documentedConfounds.why: Sim omits damage that occurs in real fights (a handful of boss hits × 30% × 138.24%), so sim runs slightly low vs real — a small under-credit, opposite sign to ⚑3.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE banner: entire file is HYPOTHESIS, not a validated/measured model; every ⚑ is an unmeasured estimate pending hand-tune against a real focus video.
documentedConfounds.why: Meta-confound — no part of the model has been measured against real gameplay, so any of the above estimates could be materially off. Consistent with the unit having no board data (ungraded, MODEL_ONLY).

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled base Scarlet (slug `scarlet`, AR/Electric/Attacker/B3 — explicitly NOT scarlet-black-shadow) as a parser-baseline HYPOTHESIS, not a validated model. Faithfully encoded: S1 self ATK▲23.15% on hitCount:10 (5 stacks/5s), S2b passive crit-dmg▲6.61%, and burst crit-rate▲19.57%/10s + 849.15% burst flatDamage vs the single boss. The two HP-gated buffs are modeled ASSUMED-ACTIVE because the S1 'Current HP ▼4.01%' self-drain (itself unmodeled — no HP mechanic in engine) arithmetically pushes her below 60%/50% within ~28s/~37s; this over-credits early ramp (⚑3). The S2 30%-when-attacked 138.24% proc is deliberately skipped to unmodeled (no incoming boss attacks in-sim, ⚑4 ~0-3% real). Known-not-yet-faithful: the cadence tuple is escalated to likely-wrong (⚑1) and drives the S1 stack steady-state (⚑2); the unit has no board data and is ungraded MODEL_ONLY.
